Escape Plan
Employment intelligence

Work Abroad.
Keep US Income.

Federal jobs, international orgs, remote boards, contractor gigs, and seasonal work. Every path to getting paid overseas.

4.8M
Americans working abroad
280+
Countries with US federal posts
$95k
Avg federal overseas salary
40%
Tax savings vs domestic

Where to Find the Jobs

Top platforms for finding work abroad or fully remote

🦅

USAJobs Overseas

Federal Government

Medium

Official US federal job board with overseas postings across embassies, military bases, USAID, State Dept, and 400+ agencies.

SALARY
$50,000–$180,000/yr
LOCATIONS
Worldwide — 180+ countries
✦Federal benefits package
✦COLA adjustments
✦Housing allowance
✦Security clearance roles

Pro tip: Filter by "Overseas" and "Duty Station Outside US". Many roles require clearance but civilian roles exist.

🌐

UN Jobs

International Organization

Hard

United Nations and all UN agencies: UNICEF, WHO, WFP, UNHCR. Roles in development, humanitarian, admin, and technical fields.

SALARY
$60,000–$220,000/yr
LOCATIONS
Worldwide with mission areas
✦Tax-free salary
✦Pension scheme
✦Travel stipend
✦Education grant for kids

Pro tip: Start as UNV (UN Volunteer) to build profile. G-series roles don't require language tests.

⚔️

NATO Careers

Defense Alliance

Hard

Civilian roles at NATO HQ Brussels, SHAPE Mons, and 30+ facilities across Europe and beyond in policy, IT, communications, and operations.

SALARY
$65,000–$175,000/yr
LOCATIONS
Belgium, Germany, UK, Netherlands, Turkey + more
✦NATO pension
✦Tax-free status
✦Housing allowance
✦Education subsidies

Pro tip: NATO requires citizenship from member state. US citizens fully eligible. Secret clearance a plus.

💻

Remote.co

Remote Work Board

Medium

Top-quality remote job board with vetted listings. Focus on established companies with remote-first culture, not gig work.

SALARY
$40,000–$200,000/yr
LOCATIONS
Anywhere with internet
✦Work from any country
✦US salary abroad
✦Async culture
✦Digital nomad lifestyle

Pro tip: Best for tech, marketing, customer success. Companies marked "Remote Friendly" are global hire.

🌍

We Work Remotely

Remote Work Board

Medium

Largest remote job community. Heavy on programming, design, marketing, and support roles from companies already distributed globally.

SALARY
$35,000–$180,000/yr
LOCATIONS
Anywhere — truly global
✦Huge volume of listings
✦Developer-heavy
✦Async companies
✦Visa-friendly employers

Pro tip: Apply with your timezone shown as flexible. Many companies prefer candidates already abroad.

🌱

Seasonal Work Abroad

Seasonal & Temporary

Easy

Harvest jobs, resort work, yacht crew, ski patrol, farm stays, dive instructors. Get paid to live in incredible places for 3–6 months.

SALARY
$800–$4,000/mo + housing
LOCATIONS
New Zealand, Australia, Norway, Mediterranean yachts, Swiss Alps
✦Free housing often included
✦Experience & skills
✦Working visa pathways
✦Incredible social life

Pro tip: Australia Working Holiday Visa (age 18–35) is the king of this category. One year, extendable to 3.

Contractor Roles

High-paying contract work with overseas deployment

🛡

Military Contractor

$80k–$200k+

OCONUS — Germany, Japan, Korea, Middle East

SAIC, Booz Allen, CACI, Leidos, DynCorp

🌱

Development Contractor

$60k–$140k

Africa, MENA, Southeast Asia, Balkans

Chemonics, Palladium, AECOM, Creative Associates

⚡

Tech Contractor Abroad

$50k–$250k

Anywhere — full remote

Toptal, Turing, Andela, Deel, Remote.com

⛽

Oil & Gas / Energy

$100k–$300k

Middle East, North Sea, West Africa, SE Asia

Halliburton, Schlumberger, Baker Hughes, Shell

Work Visa Routes

Countries actively recruiting American professionals

🇩🇪 Germany

1 year to find job
Opportunity Card

Job-seeker visa to find work in Germany

Req: Degree + German or qualified worker

🇵🇹 Portugal

2 years renewable
D3 Highly Qualified

For tech workers, researchers, managers

Req: Job offer + qualification

🇸🇬 Singapore

1–2 years renewable
Employment Pass

Employer-sponsored work visa

Req: S$4,500+/mo salary offer

🇨🇦 Canada

Varies
Global Talent Stream

Fast-track 2-week work permit for tech

Req: Tech job offer from Canadian company

🇦🇺 Australia

2–4 years
TSS 482

Temporary skills shortage sponsorship

Req: Job offer in shortage occupation

🇳🇱 Netherlands

3 years renewable
Highly Skilled Migrant

Employer-sponsored for qualified professionals

Req: Recognized sponsor + salary threshold
